title: Clinical Operations Specialist
summary: Clinical Operations Specialist with 5 years of experience. Focused on measurable outcomes, cross-functional collaboration and reliable knowledge graph extraction signals. Core strengths include Sample Tracking, SOP, Patient Data, Clinical Operations.

experiences.description: Delivered measurable work in healthcare / clinical ops using Sample Tracking, LIMS, Regulatory Documentation, SOP. Collaborated with product, engineering and operations teams to improve delivery quality.
